overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l} E ^ {c w} (s ^ {\prime \prime}) = \text { creeping wave field along s^{\prime\prime}} \\ D ^ {s} (Q _ {1}) = \text { the surface diffraction coefficient (attachment coefficient) at point A } \\ \gamma (s ^ {\prime \prime}) = \alpha (s ^ {\prime \prime}) + j \beta (s ^ {\prime \prime}) = \text { creeping wave propagation factor } \\ s ^ {\prime \prime} = \text { arc length along the creeping wave path } \\ G (s ^ {\prime \prime}) = \text { the ray divergence factor determined by the geometry of the ray } \end{array}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{l} E ^ {c w} (s ^ {\prime \prime}) = \text { creeping wave field along } s^{\prime\prime} \\ D ^ {s} (Q _ {1}) = \text { the surface diffraction coefficient (attachment coefficient) at point A } \\ \gamma (s ^ {\prime \prime}) = \alpha (s ^ {\prime \prime}) + j \beta (s ^ {\prime \prime}) = \text { creeping wave propagation factor } \\ s ^ {\prime \prime} = \text { arc length along the creeping wave path } \\ G (s ^ {\prime \prime}) = \text { the ray divergence factor determined by the geometry of the ray } \end{array}
